content_en:
The practise of organizing gatherings in the home, at the grave or in the masjid to give condolenses to the family of the dead person is against the sunnah of the companions of the Prophet (r). пә©Щҗ пәҚп»ҹп» пұ о ўпә’о  п»ҘЩҗ п»Ӣо ўпәӯЩҗп»ҙпәӯЩҚ пә’о   пә о ўп»Ҙо  п»Ӣ п» Щҗп»І п»—п№¶пәҺЩ„ЩҺо  пә о  п»ӘЩҗ пәҚп»ҹп№ҫпә’ : о  пәҺп»ЎЩҗ п»ӨЩҗп»Ҙо  пә”п№¶ пәҚп»ҹп»Ғпұ п»Ңо  п»Ёп№ҫп»Ңо Ўпәјо  пә•Щҗ п»ӯо ¬п»ҙо  Щ„Щҗ пәҚп»ҹп№ҫп»Өо ў пәҮЩҗп»ҹп№¶п»° пәғЩҺп»«о  пәҺп»үо  пәҳЩҗп»Өо ўп»Ҝ пәҚп№ҫп»№Щҗпә о  п»ңп№ёп»Ёпұ пәҺ п»Ёп№¶пәӯ пә”Щҗ о  пәҺпәӨо  пәҚп»ҹп»Ёпұўп»ҙ . 45 Collected by at-Tirmithee and Sunan Ibn-i-Majah vol.2, p.382 no.1476. 46 Collected by al-Bukhaaree and Muslim, Sahih al-Bukhari, vol.2, p.227 no.404, Sahih Muslim vol.2, p.452 no.2077 &2078, Sunan Abu Dawud vol.2, p.911, no.3198 and Mishkat Al-Masabih,, vol.1, p.348.

Jareer ibn вҖҳAbdillaah al-Bajalee said, вҖңWe used to regard gathering at the home of the deceasedвҖҷs family and their preparation of food an aspect of wailing.вҖқ47 Imaam ash-ShaafiвҖҳee said, вҖңI dislike gatherings, even if there is no wailing or crying. For it only renews the [familyвҖҷs feelings of] sorrow and puts burdens on their food supplies.вҖқ48 Imaam an-Nawawee related that the leading scholars prohibited organized gatherings based on it being an innovation.49
content_id: Praktik menyelenggarakan perkumpulan di rumah, di kubur, atau di masjid untuk menyampaikan ta'ziyah kepada keluarga orang yang meninggal bertentangan dengan sunnah para sahabat Nabi п·ә. Jarir bin Abdillah al-Bajali berkata, "Kami dahulu memandang berkumpul di rumah keluarga jenazah dan penyediaan makanan oleh mereka sebagai bagian dari ratapan." Imam asy-Syafi'i berkata, "Aku tidak menyukai perkumpulan, meskipun tidak ada ratapan maupun tangisan. Karena hal itu hanya memperbarui (perasaan duka keluarga) dan membebani persediaan makanan mereka." Imam an-Nawawi menyebutkan bahwa ulama-ulama terkemuka melarang perkumpulan yang terorganisasi karena hal itu merupakan bid'ah.
